docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND SETTLEMENT HEARING HEARING SET FOR DEC-17-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 218

Tim Poppin, Limited Scope Attorney, for Defendant Maria Fernandez, who is present.
